spells.name: Ward-Step Directive I
spells.summary: A licensed short reposition onto a marked tile.
spells.line: You file yourself out of one lawful position and into another.

spells.name: Cleansing Writ I
spells.summary: Strikes an unlicensed condition from the record, and from you.
spells.line: The charter reads the affliction, declares it improper, and files it away.

spells.name: Surveyor's Edict I
spells.summary: Measures a target down to its exploitable flaw.
spells.line: Charter light walks the target and notes, precisely, where it fails.

spells.name: Bulwark Edict I
spells.summary: Raises a lawful barrier of white geometry around you.
spells.line: Exact white lines close over you like a clause you cannot be argued out of.

spells.name: Furrow Edict I
spells.summary: Rules a strip of ground into difficult, warded terrain.
spells.line: The charter scores the ground into a lawful furrow that resists the unlicensed.
